Teakwave Public Company Limited — Internal Legal & Compliance Note (TH), DocRef: TW-ICM-2569-05, Subject: PDPA/SEA checks on SET disclosures and cross-border agreements
Background: The Company is SET-listed and, on 15 May 2569, filed with the SEC Thailand and SET News Portal a summary of the plain-vanilla debenture programme and covenant package; these details are already public and not MNPI under the SEA.
As required under the SEA and SEC disclosure practice guidelines, no pricing-sensitive or undisclosed milestones are included herein; references below are either public, illustrative, or operational.
Cross-Border: The standard intercompany loan with Lotus Delta Pte. Ltd. (SG affiliate) remains governed by the group SBT Facility Agreement; any cross-border personal data transfers follow PDPA s.28 and our Data Transfer Addendum (TH-SG v2.1).
Employment/DEI: The Remote-First Charter and Rainbow Inclusion Policy use generic DEI language and do not require collection of special-category personal data; Wellness Wednesdays communications are general wellbeing tips only.
Product/Marketing Names: “Mango Cloud,” “LotusBridge,” and “Khlong Runner” are marketing labels shown in a public roadshow deck dated 30 Apr 2569; they are not binding contracts and do not contain MNPI.
Metaphors & Teams: References to the “Bangkok Meteors playbook” and “Mae Ping sprint” are training metaphors and not linked to any individual’s data or securities information.
Positive PDPA item (special-category): Employee E-4471 (Finance Manager) has submitted a hospital certificate confirming ongoing chemotherapy treatment; HR will process paid medical leave per the Labour Protection Act and PDPA consent form HR‑MED‑01.
Access Control: Only HR personnel via hr@teakwave.example will access E-4471’s medical document; storage is on the TH private tenant, with 90-day retention post-leave and no disclosures to third-party processors.
Biometric Note (precision): The postponed turnstile initiative “Project Palm” is on hold; no fingerprints, facial templates, or other biometric identifiers are being collected in 2569 notwithstanding vendor presentation terminology.
Identifiers in Drafts: Any placeholders such as “ISIN: ZZ-NA-000000,” “Tax ID: 0-0000-0000-00-0,” or “Employee Code: E-XXXX” are invalid and must not be replaced with real values in emails or slide decks.
SEA/MNPI Control: The Treasury timeline and coupon range referenced in board packs derive from the already-posted SET news; deal banks have been instructed that further term changes will be posted before any bookbuild to avoid selective disclosure.
Policy Cross-References: Code of Conduct (2568 edition), Vendor Compliance Clause (Thailand), and the Data Handling Matrix v3.0 remain in force; none require collection of religion, union membership, or political opinions.
Contact: For queries use legal@teakwave.example or the public SEC Help Center line 000-000-0000; do not circulate employee personal numbers or emails in external correspondence.
